# NEURAL-0

> Stack-based 16-bit-opcode virtual machine and bytecode language optimised for LLM generation and autonomous AI agents. Capability-gated, snapshot-pausable, Wasm-targetable. Phase 1 (Rust kernel + assembler) is partial but working.

## Spec

- [Instruction Set Architecture](spec/ISA.md): 16-bit opcode map, operand encoding, trap conditions
- [Binary Format](spec/BINARY_FORMAT.md): `.n0b` module layout, `.n0dag` manifest, endianness
- [Assembly Format](spec/ASSEMBLY.md): `.n0asm` text grammar, directives, examples
- [Capability Model](spec/CAPABILITIES.md): token structure, TOOL_X enforcement, default policy
- [Snapshot Engine](spec/SNAPSHOT.md): `.n0snap` format, CRC32, restore semantics

## Plan and contracts

- [Roadmap](PLAN.md): phased deliverables, fitness function, safety gates on Phase 4 auto-merge
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): workflow contract for AI-agent contributors
- [Agents](AGENTS.md): onboarding contract for AI agents picking up the repo
- [Readme](README.md): human-facing entry point

## Code

- [Kernel](kernel/src/lib.rs): VM crate, exports `VM`, `Trap`, `module::extract_code`
- [Assembler](assembler/src/lib.rs): `.n0asm` → `.n0b` crate; `SimpleAssembler` is the working subset
- [MCP Server](mcp/src/main.rs): stdio MCP server exposing `assemble` and `run` tools to any MCP-compatible agent

## Examples

- [Hello, arithmetic](tests/programs/hello_arithmetic.n0asm): push 2, push 3, add, halt. End-to-end working.
- [Conditional](tests/programs/conditional.n0asm): acceptance target, blocked on full assembler
- [Snapshot/resume](tests/programs/snapshot_resume.n0asm): acceptance target, blocked on full assembler

## Build and run

```
cargo check --workspace
cargo run -p neural0_kernel -- asm tests/programs/hello_arithmetic.n0asm -o /tmp/hello.n0b
cargo run -p neural0_kernel -- run /tmp/hello.n0b
```
